examples: Barons had to swear an oath of allegiance to the king.
Most historians have underestimated the extent and significance of women's political allegiance in the antebellum period.
My allegiance to Kendall and his company ran deep.
But a new allegiance from working-class women could add even more momentum this time around.
Once Brahms was set up as Wagner's adversary, he drew vilification or adoration according to allegiance.
